summary: Iteration 5 - Theme (Mode Nuit) testing complete. All three themes (Light, Dark, Silence) are working correctly across all tested modules. Theme toggle cycles properly: light -> dark -> silence -> light. Theme persists when navigating between pages.
critical_code_review_comments: All referenced files properly import and use useTheme hook from ThemeContext
Theme colors correctly applied: Light (#FAF6F0), Dark (#1A1612), Silence (#0C0A08)
Theme toggle button shows correct icon for current state: moon (light), eye (dark), sun (silence)
Theme persisted via AsyncStorage under key 'theme_mode'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme functionality fully working. All pages use useTheme hook correctly. Theme persists across navigation.

Theme Toggle on Landing Page.details: Moon icon in top-right corner toggles themes correctly

Theme Toggle on Home Page.details: Theme toggle in header (left of avatar) cycles light -> dark -> silence -> light

Light Theme (#FAF6F0).details: Cream background, warm brown text, properly styled cards

Dark Theme (#1A1612).details: Dark brown background, warm off-white text, proper contrast

Silence Theme (#0C0A08).details: Almost black background, muted warm text, very dark cards

Cadence Page Theme.details: Background, cards, text, rituals, streak badge all respect theme

Sagesse/Citations Page Theme.details: Background, quote card, action buttons, refresh button all themed

Lettre à Moi Page Theme.details: Background, input fields, cards, buttons all respect theme

Capsule Write Page Theme.details: Uses useTheme, background and text properly styled

Capsule List Page Theme.details: Uses useTheme, card backgrounds and text respect theme

Capsule Detail Page Theme.details: Uses useTheme, sealed/unlocked states properly themed

Dreams Index Page Theme.details: Uses useTheme, dream cards, oracle button, delete modal all themed

Dreams Detail Page Theme.details: Uses useTheme, interpretation card, emotion chips themed

Astrology/Cosmos Page Theme.details: Dark theme verified - tabs, moon phase card, input fields styled

Mirror Page Theme.details: Dark theme verified - tabs, icon, text, input field all themed

Sceller Page Theme.details: Silence theme verified - candle icon, form elements properly styled

Theme Persistence.details: Theme saved to AsyncStorage and persists across page navigation
